scripts.build: bun run build:cjs && bun run build:esm
scripts.build:cjs: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist/cjs --target node --format cjs --external axios --external form-data && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json --emitDeclarationOnly && echo '{"type":"commonjs"}' > dist/cjs/package.json
scripts.build:esm: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist/esm --target node --format esm --external axios --external form-data && tsc -p tsconfig.esm.json --emitDeclarationOnly
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run clean && bun run build
